title: Crispy Japanese Broccoli Skewers
description: A buttery and snappy solo dinner dish featuring broccoli, this recipe is perfect for a quick and delicious meal, and is also anti-inflammatory friendly.
instructions: Preheat the raclette grill to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together soy sauce, sesame oil, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the broccoli florets to the bowl and toss to coat with the soy sauce mixture.
Thread the broccoli florets onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the skewers with unsalted butter and sprinkle with lemon juice.
Place the skewers on the raclette grill and cook for 10-12 minutes, or until crispy and tender.
Remove the skewers from the grill and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
